name: kiosk-analytics
description: First-party kiosk analytics bundle for live touchpoints, collector APIs, validation, aggregate outputs, and sales join keys.

interface.shortDescription: First-party live analytics for kiosk journeys.
interface.longDescription: Packages the kioskDataLayer runtime, event tracker bridge, live collector, schemas, touchpoint maps, dashboard aggregate contracts, Ruflo workflow, docs, and verification tests for the Fynd kiosk dashboard.
defaultPrompt: Implement kiosk journey tracking with the first-party dataLayer.
Validate kiosk analytics events against the touchpoint contract.
Check the live dashboard collector and aggregate outputs.
